title: dikaiosis #1347
definition:
1) the act of God declaring men free from guilt and acceptable to him
 2) abjuring to be righteous, justification
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) the act of God declaring men free from guilt and acceptable to him
 2) abjuring to be righteous, justification

    NASB:  the act of pronouncing righteous, acquittal:
